tasks.subject: Task 1: SessionRecap Singleton — Data Layer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create core singleton managing sessionRecap world setting.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/session-recap.mjs`
- Modify: `scripts/vagabond-crawler.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/session-recap.mjs", "scripts/vagabond-crawler.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "game.vagabondCrawler.recap.getData()", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sessionRecap setting registered", "read/write methods work", "migration works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Absorb LootTracker Internals
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Redirect LootTracker storage to SessionRecap, delete LootTrackerApp.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/loot-tracker.mjs`
- Delete: `templates/loot-tracker.hbs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/loot-tracker.mjs", "templates/loot-tracker.hbs"], "verifyCommand": "game.vagabondCrawler.recap.getData().loot", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LootTracker facade works", "LootTrackerApp deleted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Combat & Damage Capture Hooks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register hooks for combat encounters, damage from damage-log, kill attribution.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/session-recap.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/session-recap.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "game.vagabondCrawler.recap.getData().combats", "acceptanceCriteria": ["combat hooks work", "damage tracking works", "kill attribution works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Roll Stats Capture via Chat Messages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Capture attack/save roll stats from chat messages.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/session-recap.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/session-recap.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "game.vagabondCrawler.recap.getData().playerStats", "acceptanceCriteria": ["attack stats tracked", "save stats tracked", "avg d20 tracked"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: XP Logging Integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire XP counter patch to log awards to SessionRecap.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/xp-counter-patch.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/xp-counter-patch.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "game.vagabondCrawler.recap.getData().xp", "acceptanceCriteria": ["XP logged on award", "question snapshot correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Discord Markdown Export
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement formatForDiscord() for full session recap markdown.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/session-recap.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/session-recap.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "game.vagabondCrawler.recap.formatForDiscord()", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all sections formatted", "empty sections omitted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: SessionRecapApp — Tabbed UI Window
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create tabbed ApplicationV2 window with Overview, Combat, Loot, XP tabs.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/session-recap-app.mjs`
- Create: `templates/session-recap.hbs`
- Modify: `scripts/session-recap.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/session-recap-app.mjs", "templates/session-recap.hbs", "scripts/session-recap.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "game.vagabondCrawler.recap.open()", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 tabs work", "footer buttons work", "window config correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: CSS Styling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add styles for session recap window.

**Files:**
- Modify: `styles/vagabond-crawler.css`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["styles/vagabond-crawler.css"], "verifyCommand": "visual inspection", "acceptanceCriteria": ["styling matches module", "both themes work"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: CrawlBar Integration, Chat Command & module.json
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace loot tracker button, add !recap command, add damage-log recommends.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/crawl-bar.mjs`
- Modify: `scripts/vagabond-crawler.mjs`
- Modify: `module.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/crawl-bar.mjs", "scripts/vagabond-crawler.mjs", "module.json"], "verifyCommand": "!recap in chat", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CrawlBar button works", "chat command works", "module.json valid"]}
```
